name: Honey-Mustard Dressing - III
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cider vinegar and honey in a heavy small saucepan over low heat, or in a microwave, stirring until the honey dissolves.
2. Pour the mixture into a bowl and allow it to cool.
3. Whisk together the mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, finely minced onion, chopped fresh parsley, and salt.
4. Gradually whisk in the vegetable oil.
- This dressing can be prepared up to 3 days ahead. Cover and refrigerate. Bring to room temperature before using.
Note: Typically, I make about two-thirds of this batch. It requires less salt than indicated—approximately 1/4 teaspoon for the two-thirds batch. For the full batch, consider using about 1 1/2 tablespoons fresh parsley instead of the 2 tablespoons specified above. This dressing pairs well with a spinach and mushroom salad.
Makes about 1 1/2 cups
